offline_build.note: tsc -b typecheck + vite production build of the seeded reference-app's TypeScript; 422 modules transformed, no errors. Confirms the TS seed compiles. The Move package under contracts/ was NOT built or published — that requires the deepbook-sandbox + sui CLI (and the .external-packages/{token,deepbook} source deps), which is out of scope for the offline soundness check.

live_validation.blocker: deepbook-sandbox `pnpm deploy-all --quick` currently fails at `sui client test-publish` (CLI-vs-Move-package version drift in the sandbox repo); also this lesson's own arb_executor Move package must be published to a healthy sandbox (via contracts/scripts/deploy.sh, writing deployment.json) before its live test can run.
live_validation.blocker_repo: MystenLabs/deepbook-sandbox (separate repo; not part of this lesson)
live_validation.consequence: This lesson is live-gated (final_verification runs `pnpm vitest run` against a running sandbox with the arb_executor package published). With no healthy sandbox, the two live tests (positive borrow-execute-repay digest; short-repay revert asserting the abort fired inside arb_executor::execute_base, not at the borrow step) cannot be executed, and the dual-output-mode learner sub-agent pass was not run.

known_issues: Live validation pending a healthy sandbox: re-run `pnpm deploy-all --quick` in deepbook-sandbox once the test-publish CLI/package version-drift issue is resolved, then re-run this lesson's live gate.

This lesson's arb_executor Move package must be published before the live test can run: `DEEPBOOK_SANDBOX_DIR=$HOME/workspace/deepbook-sandbox/sandbox bash contracts/scripts/deploy.sh` (writes deployment.json with the chain-specific arbExecutorPackageId). The seeded deployment.json carries a stale id from a prior localnet — re-publish after any sandbox re-genesis, then `cd reference-app && pnpm vitest run` and dispatch the dual-mode learner validation before considering this lesson shippable.
